name: Hot Dog Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Open pit sauce with onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Add beans, onion, onion powder, molasses, ketchup, BBQ sauce, and sugar to the crockpot.
2. Place hot dogs in the pot.
3. Stir gently to mix all ingredients.
4. Cook on low for about 8 hours.
5. If the sauce is too runny, lift the cover for the last hour or two to allow moisture to evaporate.
